metadata.description: Backend engineer building and operating production systems. Currently building Ultimate Frisbee Tracker, a real-time tournament platform serving ~1,700 users.

home.name: Juan Murillo
home.description: I design and operate production backend systems. Right now I'm building Ultimate Frisbee Tracker, a real-time tournament platform running in production since March 2025.
home.focusDescription: Backend systems that hold up in production: data modeling, event-driven architecture, realtime consistency, and the infrastructure decisions behind them.
